title: Stryker Corporation 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary filing source for Stryker's business description, segment context, revenue, earnings, and risk factors.

title: Mako SmartRobotics Overview
note: Official product source for Mako robotic-arm assisted surgery, procedure scope, installed footprint claims, studies, and patent claims.

title: Triathlon Total Knee System
note: Official product source for Stryker's Triathlon primary total knee replacement system.

title: Stryker Market Cap
note: Market data source for Stryker's approximate market capitalization in late May 2026.

title: Stryker PE Ratio
note: Market data source for Stryker's reported P/E ratio in May 2026.

title: Open Surgical Robot
note: Open surgical robotics project relevant to low-cost research and ex-vivo training alternatives.

title: ROSurgical: An Open-Source Framework for Telesurgery
note: Research source describing an open-source ROS-based framework for medical robot and telesurgery control.

title: 3D Printing of Medical Devices
note: Regulatory source explaining that additive manufacturing is used for medical devices including orthopedic implants and surgical instruments.

title: Process of 3D Printing Medical Devices
note: Regulatory source for material controls, process controls, testing, and approval considerations for 3D-printed medical devices.

title: Personalized, 3D-Printed Orthopedic Implants
note: Commercial evidence that personalized 3D-printed orthopedic implants are an active market direction, including personalized total knee solutions.

title: KneeBones3Dify: Open-source software for segmentation and 3D reconstruction of knee bones from MRI data
note: Open-source software source relevant to knee imaging, segmentation, reconstruction, and planning workflows.
